identity.name: Jason W. Darrow
identity.title: IT Delivery Manager | AI Project Builder

summaries.text: Progressive IT Leader with 15+ years of experience managing cross-functional delivery teams and programs ranging from $250K to $3M. Proven track record of enhancing process efficiency, managing vendor and FTE resources both onshore and offshore, and serving as the face of IT for business stakeholders. PMP and CSM certified.

Technology leader with deep roots in software architecture, application development, and IT delivery — now building AI-powered systems to drive business outcomes. Combines 20 years of hands-on technical experience with 6 years of delivery leadership to bridge the gap between AI capability and business value.

IT leader with a developer foundation — architect, designer, and developer turned technical team manager. Experienced leading teams of business analysts, developers, and contractors through full SDLC. Managed 14-member teams, oversaw enterprise-scale applications, and delivered solutions supporting billions in managed assets.

bullets.text: Oversaw delivery and execution of business-prioritized IT programs ranging from $250K to $3M, managing 30+ application teams across onshore and offshore resources.
Served as the face of IT for business stakeholders, coordinating communications across enterprise teams throughout all stages of the project lifecycle.
Coordinated development-to-maintenance knowledge transfer sessions across application teams, ensuring continuity and reducing delivery risk.
Collected and consolidated development and QA effort estimates from across the enterprise at project concept stage to support planning and budgeting.
Provided guidance and structure to blended project teams comprised of vendor and FTE resources, both onshore and offshore.

experience.title: Service Delivery Consultant / Tech Team Manager

bullets.text: Managed a 14-member team of business analysts and developers, responsible for hiring decisions that directly influenced team synergy and performance.
Served as Application Manager for the Client and Account Closure Orchestration portal, supporting 8 lines of business and 5 regulatory groups.
Facilitated annual planning sessions with business partners and coordinated cross-team delivery for projects ranging from $250K to $1.5M.
Successfully supported Data Management applications for regulatory compliance, coordinating across enterprise infrastructure, architecture, and support teams.
Managed teams using Agile-based project methods, facilitating requirements sessions with business partners and test planning sessions with QA teams.
Led technical teams through all phases of the SDLC, managing contractors, consultants, and FTEs located in the US and internationally.
Implemented a document management solution using the Google Search Appliance as part of the Client Onboarding program.
Delivered multiple KYC (Know Your Customer) portal projects, creating front-end solutions for business partner use.
Architected, designed, and developed an aircraft residual calculator for the Corporate Aircraft Finance Group of Bank of America Leasing, responsible for $1.2B in business.
Served as Technical Team Leader for bankofamericaleasing.com, the corporate site for a leasing company responsible for $32B in managed assets.
Selected by CIO to fill the role of Leasing Domain Architect, recognizing technical leadership and architectural expertise.
Implemented Java-based solution to pull data from a Data Warehouse, convert to XML, and batch process with a third-party financial calculator to deliver daily portfolio profitability snapshots.
Led Computer Information Security assessments for all Leasing LOB applications, coordinating a team across 17 assessments and 5 project managers.
Delivered eLearning software development projects for Fortune 1000 companies including Microsoft, Prudential, Fidelity, and Princeton Review.

projects.name: AI Job Search System
projects.description: Built an AI-powered job search agent that scrapes job boards, filters by criteria, tailors resumes and cover letters using the Claude API, and tracks application progress through a full pipeline.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science, Management of Information Systems (Magna Cum Laude)
